title: Add Custom Image to Board
excerpt: Would like to add a custom image to board header. Similar to how the workspace image works. If I could see a custom image on each board, it would validate that I’m in the right place quickly, without reading the title. I…

posts.author: lightsey (Brent Lightsey)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to add a custom image to board header. Similar to how the workspace image works. If I could see a custom image on each board, it would validate that I’m in the right place quickly, without reading the title. It would also be a lightweight way to brand the board.

posts.author: edoaber (Edoardo Bernasconi)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d be interest in this feature, too. We are an architectural firm an it’d be very helpful to be able to recognize boards at a glance through visualization.

posts.author: pjtgrizzly (Reid)
posts.cookedHtml:
I could see like 3 different sizes, No Header/banner, Thin Banner/Header that doesn’t push down the table down so far and larger banner that isn’t immense but pushes the table down further.

Wen you scroll down on the board, banner disappears as work first
